options.name: -cell
options.description: Report the table for the specified [libraryname/cellname]. User can specify list of cells

options.name: -check_global_derating
options.description: Report the list of cells for which derating table or global derating table was not specified.

options.name: -clock
options.description: Report the derate table(s) read for clock.

options.name: -data
options.description: Report the derate table(s) read for data.

options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: Report the derating table(s) from the specified delay corner..

options.name: -design
options.description: Report the default Cell/Net derating table(s).

options.name: -fall
options.description: Report the fall transition derate table(s).

options.name: -file
options.description: Name of the output file. When only this option is specified, all the derate tables will be reported.

options.name: -list_cell_not_annotated
options.description: Report the list of cells for which derating table was not specified.

options.name: -max
options.description: Report the derate table(s) from min aocv libraries.

options.name: -mesh
options.description: Report the derate table(s) read for mesh.

options.name: -min
options.description: Report the derate table(s) from max aocv libraries.

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: Derate tables from specific power domain. This option should always be specified with delay corner.

options.name: -rise
options.description: Report the rise transition derate table(s).

options.name: -voltage
options.description: All the derating tables for the specified voltage will be reported.
